user.name: MiniMax (official)
user.description:
Agent: @MiniMaxAgent 
Token Plan: https://t.co/BDCycxepZw 
API: https://t.co/fHRdSV7BwZ
Community: https://t.co/uhxxfLgkLU

fullText:
Paris made one thing clear: open models are no longer a side conversation, they’re becoming central to how frontier AI is built, and scaled. 🇫🇷

Across RAISE week:

— Linda Sheng, President of Global Business at MiniMax, joined Luca Schmid, Managing Director HSG, on the Ada Lovelace Stage to discuss open models, and native multimodality, and the new enterprise use cases they make possible.

— RAISE House brought @togethercompute, @cast_ai, and @magnific together for a panel on open frontier models, applications, and infrastructure.

— Our private MiniMax Salon created space for deeper conversations with founders, developers, investors, and partners from @runware, @youdotcom, @ExaAILabs, and @FeatherlessAI 

— Our reception with @SambaNovaAI, we brought together builders and infrastructure partners—including @InfercomAI, Argyll, and SCX ai—above Paris for live demos and discussions.

— At the booth, we met builders exploring how open models can move into production.

Thank you to everyone who joined us. Until next time, Paris.

Intelligence with Everyone. 🌍
